titleEn: Farm-ING now offers a choice of 3 different smart weeders
titleZh: Farm-ING推出三款智能除草机，覆盖行内除草、精准喷洒与激光除草
summaryZh: 奥地利智能农业设备公司Farm-ING在其原有行内除草机InRowING基础上，新增SpotSprayING精准喷洒机和LaserING激光除草机，形成三款AI驱动的智能除草产品组合。其中SpotSprayING工作宽度可达12米，起价7.5万欧元；LaserING预计今年上市。此举标志着智能除草技术从单一机械除草向多模式、高精度、广幅宽方向迈进，对减少化学除草剂使用、提升杂草防控效率具有重要实践意义。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了AI与机器人技术在种植业杂草防控中的最新集成应用，其多模式智能除草方案（机械、喷洒、激光）对智慧畜牧行业中的饲草料种植、生态牧场杂草管理具有直接借鉴价值。

Photos: Farm-ING The spotsprayer is available with 5 different working widths ranging from 2.75 to 12 metres and from prices starting at €75,000. Photos: Farm-ING Austrian smart farming equipment specialist Farm-ING has added 2 additional smart weeder options to its line-up. Farmers and contractors can now also spot-spray and laser-weed with Farm-ING. With a total of 3 different options for smart weeding, Farm-ING now offers the most extensive and varied portfolio of specialised AI-supported machines for selective weeding. The young Austrian manufacturer initially developed its InRowING in-row hoeing machine. Launched at the 2023 Agritechnica trade show in Hanover, Germany, the InRowING hoe is now available with working widths up to 7.5 metres. Prices start at €65,000. Ultra precise spot spraying up to 12 metres Since 2026, the company has also been delivering its SpotSprayING spotsprayer that uses the same algorithms as the in-row hoeing machine to distinguish plants from weeds. The spotsprayer is available with 5 different working widths ranging from 2.75 to 12 metres and from prices starting at €75,000. With the 12-metre-wide working width, the manufacturer is setting new standards when it comes to mounted 3-point linkage spotsprayers. In a solo configuration, both the spotsprayer and the tanks are combined in one unit behind the tractor. With a split configuration, the standard 400-litre tank moves to the front. !Image 7: The Farm-ING LaserING with working widths of 2 or 3 metres is expected to become available this year. The Farm-ING LaserING with working widths of 2 or 3 metres is expected to become available this year. Laser weeder coming up this year Laser weeding is currently an extremely hot topic with farmers, growers and contractors across the world, and Farm-ING is joining the companies offering laser weeding solutions. A first prototype of the mounted laser weeder was shown at the 2025 Agritechnica trade show in Hanover, Germany. The Farm-ING LaserING with working widths of 2 or 3 metres is expected to become available in 2026 for prices starting at €300,000. translationZh:
奥地利智能农业设备专家Farm-ING在其产品线中新增了两款智能除草机选项。农民和承包商现在也可以使用Farm-ING进行精准喷洒和激光除草。凭借总共三种不同的智能除草选项，Farm-ING现在提供了最广泛、最多样化的专业AI支持选择性除草设备组合。

这家年轻的奥地利制造商最初开发了其InRowING行内除草机。该产品于2023年在德国汉诺威的Agritechnica展会上推出，现在可提供工作宽度达7.5米的型号，起价为6.5万欧元。

**超精准喷洒，工作宽度达12米**

自2026年起，该公司还开始交付其SpotSprayING精准喷洒机，该机使用与行内除草机相同的算法来区分植物和杂草。精准喷洒机提供5种不同的工作宽度，从2.75米到12米不等，起价为7.5万欧元。凭借12米的工作宽度，该制造商为悬挂式三点悬挂精准喷洒机树立了新标准。在独立配置中，精准喷洒机和药箱都组合在拖拉机后方的一个单元内。在分体配置中，标准的400升药箱移至前方。

**Farm-ING LaserING激光除草机**

Farm-ING LaserING激光除草机的工作宽度为2米或3米，预计将于今年上市。
contentHtml: Austrian smart farming equipment specialist Farm-ING has added 2 additional smart weeder options to its line-up. Farmers and contractors can now also spot-spray and laser-weed with Farm-ING.
